findings.title: Password reset rate limiter is registered after the reset route, so the route bypasses throttling
Reset-token verification does not mark a valid token as used, so it is reusable until expiration

reasoning: All repository files were inspected. Password hashing uses bcrypt cost 12 and bcrypt.compare. Reset tokens use randomBytes(32), SHA-256 storage, and timingSafeEqual. The reset route is registered before its limiter, and successful verification never consumes the token.
